arts.ttl: Milan’s move for Marcus Rashford slows down due to Barcelona
arts.sum: Serie A giants Milan’s move for Manchester United’s Marcus Rashford has now slowed down due to the concrete involvement of Barcelona. The Englishman was supposed to respond to Milan’s offer…

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Arsenal in striker TALKS, Chelsea SWAP latest, Rashford Man Utd EXIT
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has provided some massive updates on the biggest transfer stories from around Europe, including Arsenal's plan to add a striker this month, Chelsea's ongoing talks with Bayern Munich over a potential swap deal involving Christopher Nkunku and Barcelona's interest in Man Utd wantaway Marcus Rashford . Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Arsenal in striker TALKS, Chelsea SWAP latest, Rashford Man Utd EXIT

arts.ttl: Man Utd open talks with Barcelona over INJURED star
arts.sum: Midfielders Casemiro and Christian Eriksen are expected to leave Old Trafford this year - and perhaps this month - which means that Man Utd will have to bring in midfielders. Former Denmark international Per Frimann believes that Man Utd should replace Casemiro with Sporting CP's Morten Hjulmand, whom Ruben Amorim once described as more 'complete' than Manuel Ugarte, but his €80 million release clause makes a deal unlikely.

arts.ttl: Vitor Roque says Barca the ‘best in the world’ after Copa del Rey win
arts.sum: Vitor Roque, who bagged a penalty in the second half, feels Barcelona are the best team in the world right now. Vitor Roque scored against parent club Barcelona for Real Betis on Wednesday night on a tough for Manuel Pellegrini’s side.

arts.ttl: Former Barca star hails Yamal as a ‘mix of Neymar & Messi’
arts.sum: Yet Yamal has long admitted his idol growing up wasn’t actually Messi but Neymar . Barcelona star Lamine Yamal was at it again on Wednesday in the Copa del Rey, putting on a masterclass for Hansi Flick’s side against Real Betis .

arts.ttl: Gavi: Barcelona's Yamal best in world after Messi
arts.sum: Barcelona midfielder Gavi says Lamine Yamal is the best player in the world after Lionel Messi following the teenager's devastating showing in Wednesday's 5-1 Copa del Rey win over Real Betis.

arts.ttl: European football: Barcelona hit five but Lyon are humbled in Coupe de France
arts.sum: Five different scorers for Barça; PSG survive scare Fifth-tier Bourgoin-Jallieu stun Lyon in shootout Barcelona had five different goalscorers as they thumped Real Betis 5-1 to progress to the quarter-finals of the Copa del Rey. The visitors from Seville were dumped out of the cup as Barça turned in a comprehensive display, goals in the first half from Gavi and Jules Koundé giving them a 2-0 cushion at the beak. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: ‘He deserves everything’ - Cubarsi hailsYamal after Barca masterclass
arts.sum: Pau Cubarsi says Barcelona team-mate Lamine Yamal “deserves everything” after another stellar performance for the Catalans against Real Betis in the Copa del Rey. “We wanted to convey to the fans the good play we had in the Super Cup. We played very well,” he told reporters.

arts.ttl: Gavi sends out strong message on Araujo after Barca win
arts.sum: Barcelona midfielder Gavi has insisted Ronald Araujo will stay at the club amid intense speculation over his future . Gavi also spoke about the win over Betis after scoring the first goal for the Catalan at Montjuic.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star speaks out on Ronald Araújo’s future after win over Real Betis
arts.sum: Barcelona star Gavi has this evening spoken out on the future of teammate Ronald Araújo. This of course comes in the midst of a chaotic week, which has seen the…
